channel.title: models-watch
channel.description: Model change notifications for opencode-go and free OpenCode Zen models

item.title: Models: 6 changed
item.description:
Changed:
• opencode-go/minimax-m2.5: "MiniMax M2.5" → "MiniMax-M2.5"
• opencode-go/minimax-m2.7: "MiniMax M2.7" → "MiniMax-M2.7"
• opencode-go/minimax-m3: "MiniMax M3 (3x usage)" → "MiniMax-M3 (3x usage)"
• opencode/minimax-m2.1-free: "MiniMax M2.1 Free" → "MiniMax-M2.1 Free"
• opencode/minimax-m2.5-free: "MiniMax M2.5 Free" → "MiniMax-M2.5 Free"
• opencode/minimax-m3-free: "MiniMax M3 Free" → "MiniMax-M3 Free"

item.title: Models: 29 added
item.description:
Added:
• opencode-go/deepseek-v4-flash
